description.value:
Prerequisite: Con 13. To sign a blood pact, you must find the appropriate Contract. See Chapter 9 for details on obtaining contracts and the various summon tribes.

Benefit: You can summon creatures of the Boar tribe, and gain a +4 bonus to Charisma-based skill checks used on such creatures. While within 50 feet of a summoned Boar, you gain Trample (slam or unarmed) 1/day.
description.summary: Summon Boar tribe; +4 Cha skill checks vs. Boars; Trample (slam or unarmed) 1/day within 50 ft of summon.
